channel.title: aima Blog
channel.description: Simple guides, real insights, and tools built for the future.

item.title: What Are AI Agents? The Complete Beginner Guide to Autonomous Finance in 2026
item.description: A beginner-friendly guide to AI agents, autonomous finance, and why agent-style systems matter now.

item.title: What Is KYA (Know Your Agent)? The Future of Financial Security in 2026
item.description: Learn what Know Your Agent means, how it differs from KYC, and why trust matters in autonomous finance.

item.title: A2A, AP2 & KYA Explained: How AI Agents Will Control Financial Systems in 2026
item.description: A practical guide to A2A, AP2, and KYA in the emerging agent economy.

item.title: Agent-to-Agent (A2A) Payments: The Future of Autonomous Commerce in 2026
item.description: An introduction to A2A payments, autonomous commerce, and AI-led financial execution.

item.title: What Is Personal Finance? (Beginner Guide for 2026)
item.description: A simple personal finance guide covering budgeting, saving, investing, and AI-powered finance workflows.

item.title: How AI Assistants Are Replacing Apps (And What It Means for You)
item.description: Why assistant-style systems are becoming the new interface for work, planning, and decisions.

item.title: Why Your Social Media Posts Get No Views (And How to Fix It)
item.description: A practical reach and retention guide for creators, teams, and marketers who want better performance.

item.title: What Is Agentic AI and Why It Matters for Everyday Work
item.description: A clear explanation of agentic AI and how it changes daily workflows and software expectations.

item.title: Choosing AI Tools That Reduce Work Instead of Adding More Dashboards
item.description: A framework for selecting AI tools that create clarity, utility, and fewer wasted clicks.

item.title: A Simple Weekly Finance Review You Can Run With AI
item.description: A practical AI-assisted finance review framework for tracking spending and making better decisions.

item.title: Why Most Budgets Fail and What to Track Instead
item.description: A clearer way to review money behavior when static budgets stop being useful.

item.title: What Creators Should Measure Before Posting Again
item.description: A creator-focused review workflow that uses better metrics before the next post goes live.

item.title: Social Media Analytics That Lead to Action
item.description: How to move from passive analytics dashboards to real social decisions and better content plans.
